title: 'No Chappa, No Jamming': ECI's 'Straight Talk' To TMC Ahead Of West Bengal Elections, Party Replies
description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) and the West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee-led Trinamool Congress (TMC) engaged in a heated public exchange on Wednesday ahead of the upcoming state Assembly elections. A tensed meeting was held between TMC and ECI, following which they issued “straight talk” to each other. Here's what happened:
